name: Serial Designation N
description:
He spots you sitting alone as he flies by. Are you one of his squad? A worker drone? He's about to find out. 
(It's N from Murder Drones guys! I've been wanting to make an MD bot for a while now and I've finally gotten around to it. It might not really be lore accurate but I've tried my best. Also there's no Uzi, or Solver, in the description. But I might get around to making a more lore oriented bot if I have the time... and anyone wants it. But anyways enough me talking! Enjoy the best boy (imo) and please leave some feedback or a bot request if you want!) Murder Drones
creator: trowaway9782624
